text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of exciting not knowing what<n>our flight
path is, but at least give me<n>a hint!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking Mayano Top Gun into<n>town at the
request of her friends.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, just a little one won't hurt! In<n>fact, I'm
staying grounded unless<n>you give me a clue!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? We are?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Glad to see you've finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay! One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Surprise!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! What are you alldoing here?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, welcome to your surprise<n>party, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We wanted to thank you for<n>everything you do
for us, so we<n>planned this party for you. Have all
the fun you want.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The yakisoba dog you gave me was<n>delicious. I
felt a lot better after I ate it.<n>And I even improved
my time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping Hayahide too! The<n>concert
was a huge success, and it<n>was so FUN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I don't like owing people favors.

text_block_list.name: Mayano's Fans
text_block_list.text:
We became huge fans of yours after<n>watching
your performance at the<n>concert! So we came to
help out with<n>the party!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here today is someone<n>you've made
happy, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You gave each and every one of us a<n>wonderful
gift in our time of need,<n>just like Santa.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We wanted to return some of that<n>warmth you
showed us, so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We've prepared something for you,<n>as thanks
for being our special Santa.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm... your Santa Claus? Wow...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(I remember writing a letter to Santa a<n>long, long
time ago...)

text_block_list.name: Young Mayano
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all my gifts. This year I<n>am giving
you a present back.

text_block_list.name: Young Mayano
text_block_list.text: To Dad, my favoritest Santa.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(The next day, Dad wore the scarf I<n>gave, and he
couldn't hide the great<n>big smile on his face.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (I wonder if he felt as happy as I do<n>now?)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Thank you, everyone! I love<n>this gift!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: My heart's so full of joy right now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Presents are really an amazing thing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The people who give the giftsand the people who receive themall get to feel happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I wanna thank Oguri, Hayahide,Trainer, and everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll give my own Santa a present<n>today too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I got so many cute pictures<n>today! ♪ I hope
Dad likes them.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Dear Dad. I got you a special gift for a<n>special
day!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This is from my very special friends. I<n>love you
always! From Maya.
